Trolls (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $153,856,089Details
International Box Office $188,975,620
Worldwide Box Office $342,831,709
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $39,053,315
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $34,094,531
Total $73,147,846
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Polar opposites, Poppy and Branch, must embark on an adventure that takes them far beyond the only world they’ve ever known.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$46,581,142 (30.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.30 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$125,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,060 opening theaters/4,066 max. theaters, 6.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $212,510,937

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 4th, 2016 (Wide) by 20th Century Fox
November 4th, 2016 (IMAX) by 20th Century Fox
International Releases: October 12th, 2016 (Wide) (Netherlands)
October 13th, 2016 (Wide) (Denmark)
October 21st, 2016 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
October 21st, 2016 (Wide) (France)
October 21st, 2016 (Wide) (Germany)
Video Release: January 24th, 2017 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some mild rude humor.
(Rating bulletin 2439 (Cert #50621), 8/24/2016)
Running Time: 93 minutes
Franchise: Trolls
Film format: 3-D, 3-D - Shot in 3-D
Plot point: Escape, Food, Makeover, Rescue
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Based on Toy
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: DreamWorks Animation, PDI, DreamWorks Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
